Appearance

InnovateHub AI GatewayMultimodal AI API

One API for Chat, Images, Video, 3D, Audio, and Embeddings

Get Started
API Reference
View on GitHub
💬

Chat Completions

OpenAI-compatible chat API with streaming support. Works with any OpenAI SDK.

🖼️

Image Generation

12 tiered models from budget ($0.001) to ultra premium ($0.08). FLUX, Imagen 4, GPT Image.

🎬

Video Generation

Text-to-video, image-to-video, video editing, and AI audio generation.

🧊

3D Generation

Generate 3D models (GLB/OBJ) from text or images. DreamGaussian, Hunyuan3D, Rodin.

🔊

Audio

Text-to-speech and speech-to-text powered by advanced neural models.

📐

Embeddings

Vector embeddings for RAG, semantic search, and AI applications.

Quick Start ​

bash
# Install OpenAI SDK
npm install openai

# Or use curl
curl https://ai-gateway.innoserver.cloud/v1/chat/completions \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "model": "inno-ai-boyong-4.5",
    "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "Hello!"}]
  }'

31 Models Available ​

CategoryCountHighlights
Chat3GPT-4/Claude compatible
Images12FLUX, Imagen 4, GPT Image
Video10Luma, Kling, Wan
3D3Hunyuan3D, Rodin
Audio2Whisper, MMS-TTS
Embeddings1MiniLM

Pricing ​

All models are pay-per-use via Replicate. See Models for detailed pricing.

TierImageVideo3D
Budget$0.001$0.05$0.05
Standard$0.003$0.15$0.15
Premium$0.05$0.35$0.20
Ultra$0.08$0.40-
